primary_facility.name: SNU Hospital MEG Center
primary_facility.operator: Neuroscience Research Institute (NRI), Medical Research Center (MRC), SNU College of Medicine
primary_facility.system: Elekta Neuromag Vectorview 306-ch (102 mag + 204 planar grad) + 64-ch EEG simultaneous, in MSR

tier_assessment.tier_1_internal_pi: Direct booking via MRC core scheduler
tier_assessment.tier_3_foreign_pi_with_korean_co_pi: Korean co-PI of record, foreign collaborator

korea_alternatives.name: KRISS Biomagnetism Research Center
korea_alternatives.notes: Lower channel count, but standards-research collaboration friendly; KR-resident data processing aligns with PIPA

korea_alternatives.name: KAIST BCS labs
korea_alternatives.system: Per-lab EEG/MEG; no dedicated 306-ch facility confirmed
korea_alternatives.notes: Likely depends on external MEG facilities for full studies

korea_alternatives.name: Yonsei University
korea_alternatives.system: No public dedicated MEG facility confirmed
korea_alternatives.notes: Strong fMRI/EEG; partner facility dependence likely

korea_alternatives.name: Korea University
korea_alternatives.system: No public dedicated MEG facility confirmed

korea_alternatives.name: KBRI
korea_alternatives.system: Brain bank + neuroimaging; no MEG core confirmed

fallback_path: KRISS MEG 152-ch as Tier-2 alternative if SNU access not feasible

compliance.pipa: raw MEG = sensitive personal information; cross-border transfer requires consent + notification + on-prem KR processing window
compliance.visa_for_foreign_pi_on_site: E-3 short-term researcher or D-2 visiting scholar; or remote oversight with KR co-PI as scan operator
